THECURSEDMOD-RITE_POTION.title: Rite Potion
THECURSEDMOD-RITE_POTION.description: Choose [blue]1[/blue] of [blue]3[/blue] random [gold]Rite[/gold] cards to add into your [gold]Hand[/gold]. It's free to play this turn. Also gain [gold]Dregs[/gold].
THECURSEDMOD-MERCY_POTION.title: Mercy Potion
THECURSEDMOD-MERCY_POTION.description: [gold]Karma[/gold] damage you receive this turn is reduced by 100%.
Add 3 random [gold]Upgraded[/gold] [gold]Circle[/gold] cards with [purple]Steady[/purple] [gold]Enchantment[/gold] into your [gold]Hand[/gold].
